response: Thank you for your email. Today's event was indeed very interesting, and both the children, parents, and our teachers found it a难得的 (unforgettable) experience. The positive outcome was largely due to your excellent suggestions, our team's quick response, and our默契 (cooperation). What is most valuable is that every member of the team truly wishes for the event to be a success. As you mentioned, this event had several areas for improvement, and to prevent similar issues in the future, I request that every teacher in the K2 team conduct a summary and reflection. At the same time, we should develop effective solutions to ensure such issues do not recur, aiming to enhance our school continuously.
